requirement_topic.en: EMC / Radio Disturbance of Lighting Equipment (NTC/CISPR 15 within RETILAP)
requirement_topic.zh: 照明设备的电磁兼容/无线电骚扰（RETILAP 框架内的 NTC/CISPR 15）
requirement_topic.zht: 照明設備的電磁兼容/無線電騷擾（RETILAP 框架內的 NTC/CISPR 15）

summary.en: Colombia does not operate a single horizontal EMC directive equivalent to the EU EMC Directive. Electromagnetic-disturbance characteristics of lighting equipment are addressed through the RETILAP technical regulation and the adopted lighting product standards, which reference CISPR 15 (limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting equipment) as adopted by ICONTEC as an NTC standard, alongside the IEC 60598/62560 product standards. Where required as part of the RETILAP conformity assessment, radio-disturbance test evidence is included in the Certificate of Conformity dossier issued through an ONAC-accredited body. Smart/wireless luminaires additionally fall under the radio approval regime administered by the CRC/ANE (see ledco-emc-02).
summary.zh: 哥伦比亚没有相当于欧盟 EMC 指令的单一横向 EMC 法规。照明设备的电磁骚扰特性通过 RETILAP 技术法规及采纳的照明产品标准处理，后者引用经 ICONTEC 采纳为 NTC 标准的 CISPR 15（电气照明设备无线电骚扰特性的限值和测量方法），并与 IEC 60598/62560 产品标准并行。在 RETILAP 合格评定要求时，无线电骚扰检测证据纳入由 ONAC 认可机构出具的合格证书档案。智能/无线灯具还须接受 CRC/ANE 管理的无线电核准制度（见 ledco-emc-02）。
summary.zht: 哥倫比亞沒有相當於歐盟 EMC 指令的單一橫向 EMC 法規。照明設備的電磁騷擾特性通過 RETILAP 技術法規及採納的照明產品標準處理，後者引用經 ICONTEC 採納為 NTC 標準的 CISPR 15（電氣照明設備無線電騷擾特性的限值和測量方法），並與 IEC 60598/62560 產品標準並行。在 RETILAP 合格評定要求時，無線電騷擾檢測證據納入由 ONAC 認可機構出具的合格證書檔案。智能/無線燈具還須接受 CRC/ANE 管理的無線電核准制度（見 ledco-emc-02）。

standards_or_laws: RETILAP — Reglamento Tecnico de Iluminacion y Alumbrado Publico (Ministerio de Minas y Energia)
NTC / CISPR 15 — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment (ICONTEC adoption)

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB 17743 (Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment), technically aligned with CISPR 15. For luminaires sold in China, GB 17743 compliance is a part of CCC certification, which covers both safety and EMC emissions for relevant product categories, with testing at CNAS/CMA-accredited laboratories. Chinese CCC EMC reports under GB 17743 are produced under the Chinese scheme and are not automatically accepted within Colombia's RETILAP Certificate of Conformity dossier without acceptance by the ONAC-accredited body.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 17743（电气照明及类似设备的无线电骚扰特性的限值和测量方法），技术上与 CISPR 15 对齐。在中国销售的灯具须符合 GB 17743，这是相关产品类别 CCC 认证（涵盖安全和 EMC 发射）的组成部分，检测在 CNAS/CMA 认可实验室进行。中国 GB 17743 下的 CCC EMC 报告依中国制度出具，未经 ONAC 认可机构接受前，不自动纳入哥伦比亚 RETILAP 合格证书档案。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 17743（電氣照明及類似設備的無線電騷擾特性的限值和測量方法），技術上與 CISPR 15 對齊。在中國銷售的燈具須符合 GB 17743，這是相關產品類別 CCC 認證（涵蓋安全和 EMC 發射）的組成部分，檢測在 CNAS/CMA 認可實驗室進行。中國 GB 17743 下的 CCC EMC 報告依中國制度出具，未經 ONAC 認可機構接受前，不自動納入哥倫比亞 RETILAP 合格證書檔案。

standards_or_laws: GB 17743 — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment (SAC/SAMR, aligned with CISPR 15)

gap.en: Both Colombia (via adopted CISPR 15 / NTC) and China (GB 17743) derive their radio-disturbance limits from CISPR 15, so the emission limits themselves are largely harmonised. The gap is structural rather than technical: (1) Colombia has no standalone horizontal EMC directive — disturbance requirements ride within RETILAP and the adopted product standards, so the exact EMC test scope depends on the certification body's RETILAP assessment and the product standard applied; (2) the evidence must be packaged into the ONAC-accredited Certificate of Conformity, not a separate CN CCC EMC report; (3) testing should reflect the Colombian 60 Hz supply; (4) confirm with the ONAC-accredited body whether existing CISPR 15-based CN test reports from an ILAC MRA laboratory can be accepted or whether retesting is required.
gap.zh: 哥伦比亚（通过采纳 CISPR 15 / NTC）与中国（GB 17743）的无线电骚扰限值均源自 CISPR 15，故发射限值本身基本协调。差距属结构性而非技术性：（1）哥伦比亚无独立横向 EMC 法规——骚扰要求依附于 RETILAP 及采纳的产品标准，故确切 EMC 检测范围取决于认证机构的 RETILAP 评估及所采用产品标准；（2）证据须纳入 ONAC 认可的合格证书，而非独立的中国 CCC EMC 报告；（3）检测应反映哥伦比亚 60 Hz 电源；（4）须与 ONAC 认可机构确认现有基于 CISPR 15 的中国 ILAC MRA 实验室检测报告能否被接受，或须重新检测。
gap.zht: 哥倫比亞（通過採納 CISPR 15 / NTC）與中國（GB 17743）的無線電騷擾限值均源自 CISPR 15，故發射限值本身基本協調。差距屬結構性而非技術性：（1）哥倫比亞無獨立橫向 EMC 法規——騷擾要求依附於 RETILAP 及採納的產品標準，故確切 EMC 檢測範圍取決於認證機構的 RETILAP 評估及所採用產品標準；（2）證據須納入 ONAC 認可的合格證書，而非獨立的中國 CCC EMC 報告；（3）檢測應反映哥倫比亞 60 Hz 電源；（4）須與 ONAC 認可機構確認現有基於 CISPR 15 的中國 ILAC MRA 實驗室檢測報告能否被接受，或須重新檢測。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory within RETILAP scope — radio-disturbance evidence per adopted CISPR 15 / NTC is part of the Certificate of Conformity dossier; Colombia has no standalone horizontal EMC directive
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 17743 compliance required as part of CCC certification for in-scope luminaires sold in China

source.publisher: Ministerio de Minas y Energia de Colombia (RETILAP)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Colombia has no standalone horizontal EMC directive; radio-disturbance requirements for lighting are handled within RETILAP and the adopted CISPR 15 / NTC product standards, with the evidence forming part of the ONAC-accredited Certificate of Conformity. Emission limits are broadly harmonised with China's GB 17743 (both CISPR 15-derived), but a CN CCC EMC report is not automatically accepted — confirm the certification body's requirements and test at Colombian 60 Hz conditions.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 哥伦比亚无独立横向 EMC 法规；照明的无线电骚扰要求在 RETILAP 及采纳的 CISPR 15 / NTC 产品标准内处理，证据构成 ONAC 认可合格证书的一部分。发射限值与中国 GB 17743（均源自 CISPR 15）基本协调，但中国 CCC EMC 报告不自动被接受——须确认认证机构要求并按哥伦比亚 60 Hz 条件检测。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 哥倫比亞無獨立橫向 EMC 法規；照明的無線電騷擾要求在 RETILAP 及採納的 CISPR 15 / NTC 產品標準內處理，證據構成 ONAC 認可合格證書的一部分。發射限值與中國 GB 17743（均源自 CISPR 15）基本協調，但中國 CCC EMC 報告不自動被接受——須確認認證機構要求並按哥倫比亞 60 Hz 條件檢測。

requirement_topic.en: Radio Approval for Smart / Wireless Luminaires (CRC / ANE)
requirement_topic.zh: 智能/无线灯具的无线电核准（CRC / ANE）
requirement_topic.zht: 智能/無線燈具的無線電核准（CRC / ANE）

summary.en: LED luminaires with integrated wireless functionality (Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, Zigbee dimming/smart control) placed on the Colombian market are subject to the radio regime administered by the CRC (Comision de Regulacion de Comunicaciones) and the ANE (Agencia Nacional del Espectro), which governs spectrum use and equipment that emits radio frequency. In addition to the RETIE/RETILAP electrical and lighting conformity, the wireless module must comply with the applicable Colombian radio-equipment / homologation requirements for the relevant frequency bands. This is a separate obligation from the Certificate of Conformity for electrical safety and from the RETIQ energy label. The in-country importer is responsible for ensuring the radio requirements are met before placing the smart luminaire on the market.
summary.zh: 集成无线功能（Wi-Fi、蓝牙、Zigbee 调光/智能控制）的 LED 灯具在哥伦比亚市场销售时，须接受 CRC（通信监管委员会）及 ANE（国家频谱局）管理的无线电制度，该制度管辖频谱使用及发射射频的设备。除 RETIE/RETILAP 电气及照明符合性外，无线模块须符合相关频段适用的哥伦比亚无线电设备/核准（homologacion）要求。这是独立于电气安全合格证书及 RETIQ 能效标签的义务。在地进口商负责在智能灯具上市前确保满足无线电要求。
summary.zht: 集成無線功能（Wi-Fi、藍牙、Zigbee 調光/智能控制）的 LED 燈具在哥倫比亞市場銷售時，須接受 CRC（通信監管委員會）及 ANE（國家頻譜局）管理的無線電制度，該制度管轄頻譜使用及發射射頻的設備。除 RETIE/RETILAP 電氣及照明符合性外，無線模組須符合相關頻段適用的哥倫比亞無線電設備/核准（homologacion）要求。這是獨立於電氣安全合格證書及 RETIQ 能效標籤的義務。在地進口商負責在智能燈具上市前確保滿足無線電要求。

standards_or_laws: CRC — Comision de Regulacion de Comunicaciones (radio-equipment regulation, Colombia)
ANE — Agencia Nacional del Espectro (spectrum management and equipment homologation, Colombia)

summary.en: In China, wireless-enabled luminaires require SRRC (State Radio Regulation Commission) type approval for the radio module in addition to any applicable CCC certification. SRRC approval governs the use of radio frequencies and authorised transmit power within China. The Chinese SRRC type-approval certificate is issued under the Chinese radio regime and is not recognised by the Colombian CRC/ANE — separate Colombian radio homologation is required for the same wireless functionality.
summary.zh: 在中国，集成无线功能的灯具除适用 CCC 认证外，还须为无线模块取得 SRRC（国家无线电管理委员会）型号核准。SRRC 核准管辖中国境内无线电频率的使用及授权发射功率。中国 SRRC 型号核准证书依中国无线电制度出具，不被哥伦比亚 CRC/ANE 认可——相同无线功能须在哥伦比亚另行办理无线电核准。
summary.zht: 在中國，集成無線功能的燈具除適用 CCC 認證外，還須為無線模組取得 SRRC（國家無線電管理委員會）型號核准。SRRC 核准管轄中國境內無線電頻率的使用及授權發射功率。中國 SRRC 型號核准證書依中國無線電制度出具，不被哥倫比亞 CRC/ANE 認可——相同無線功能須在哥倫比亞另行辦理無線電核准。

standards_or_laws: SRRC type approval — required for wireless-enabled luminaires/modules in China (State Radio Regulation Commission)

gap.en: Both countries regulate wireless modules separately from product safety, but the schemes are non-mutual. A Chinese smart luminaire with an SRRC-approved module entering Colombia must additionally satisfy the Colombian CRC/ANE radio requirements/homologation for the relevant bands — the SRRC certificate is not transferable. Frequency-band allocations and permitted power limits may also differ between China and Colombia, so the wireless module's band plan and emitted power must be verified against Colombian spectrum rules. This radio obligation is in addition to (not a substitute for) the RETIE/RETILAP Certificate of Conformity and the RETIQ energy label, and the in-country importer must coordinate all three.
gap.zh: 两国均将无线模块与产品安全分开监管，但制度不互认。带 SRRC 核准模块的中国智能灯具进入哥伦比亚时，须另行满足相关频段的哥伦比亚 CRC/ANE 无线电要求/核准——SRRC 证书不可转用。中国与哥伦比亚的频段分配及允许功率限值也可能不同，故无线模块的频段规划及发射功率须对照哥伦比亚频谱规则核验。该无线电义务是 RETIE/RETILAP 合格证书及 RETIQ 能效标签之外的附加要求（而非替代），在地进口商须协调三者。
gap.zht: 兩國均將無線模組與產品安全分開監管，但制度不互認。帶 SRRC 核准模組的中國智能燈具進入哥倫比亞時，須另行滿足相關頻段的哥倫比亞 CRC/ANE 無線電要求/核准——SRRC 證書不可轉用。中國與哥倫比亞的頻段分配及允許功率限值也可能不同，故無線模組的頻段規劃及發射功率須對照哥倫比亞頻譜規則核驗。該無線電義務是 RETIE/RETILAP 合格證書及 RETIQ 能效標籤之外的附加要求（而非替代），在地進口商須協調三者。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for wireless-enabled luminaires — Colombian radio approval / homologation via CRC/ANE required in addition to the RETIE/RETILAP Certificate of Conformity
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for wireless-enabled luminaires — SRRC type approval required for the radio module in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Smart/wireless LED luminaires entering Colombia require radio approval/homologation under the CRC/ANE regime for the relevant frequency bands, in addition to the RETIE/RETILAP Certificate of Conformity and the RETIQ label. A Chinese SRRC type approval is not recognised by Colombia, and band allocations/power limits may differ — verify the wireless module against Colombian spectrum rules. The in-country importer coordinates the radio, electrical, and energy-label obligations.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 进入哥伦比亚的智能/无线 LED 灯具须就相关频段依 CRC/ANE 制度取得无线电核准/homologacion，作为 RETIE/RETILAP 合格证书及 RETIQ 标签之外的附加要求。中国 SRRC 型号核准不被哥伦比亚认可，且频段分配/功率限值可能不同——须对照哥伦比亚频谱规则核验无线模块。在地进口商负责协调无线电、电气及能效标签义务。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 進入哥倫比亞的智能/無線 LED 燈具須就相關頻段依 CRC/ANE 制度取得無線電核准/homologacion，作為 RETIE/RETILAP 合格證書及 RETIQ 標籤之外的附加要求。中國 SRRC 型號核准不被哥倫比亞認可，且頻段分配/功率限值可能不同——須對照哥倫比亞頻譜規則核驗無線模組。在地進口商負責協調無線電、電氣及能效標籤義務。
